name: ai-setup
description: Development workspace for Yassimba's agent skills and Pi extensions

scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path cli/ai-setup/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path cli/ai-setup/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path cli/ai-setup/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:js: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run catalog:check && npm run pack:check
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:rust
